prompt: Create a high-impact Japanese anime magazine cover in a futuristic cyberpunk style, vertical portrait format, featuring a close-up ensemble composition of a pink-haired anime girl as the dominant subject. She has a short bob with layered bangs, large violet-pink eyes, pale skin, and a calm but intense expression, wearing a black baseball cap with white text, black X-shaped hairpins, a glossy black streetwear jacket with reflective graphic patches, and a magenta hood. She leans toward the viewer from the upper right-center, with one hand extended toward the camera in dramatic foreshortened perspective. Around her are 4 additional character panels total: 1 partially hidden silver-haired character in the center foreground beneath her, wearing a black cap; 1 silver-haired male character in the lower left triangular panel with dark clothing and earrings; 1 black-haired male character with a bold white forelock and golden eyes in the lower center panel; and 1 blonde female character in the lower right panel with a dark choker and layered fashion styling. Design the image as a glossy magazine cover with dense Japanese typography and editorial layout. Place a very large bold white Japanese headline on the upper left reading 交差する未来線, with smaller Japanese subhead text nearby. Add a top-right issue block reading “FEATURE”, “VOL. 03”, “2024 SPRING”, and “創刊号”. Add vertical Japanese sidebar text along the right edge, a left-side feature box with multiple lines of Japanese copy and a large magenta “5”, a bottom-left page marker reading “3/5 PAGE”, and small English tag labels near the lower panels such as “+ CONNECT”, “+ IDENTITY”, and “+ RESONANCE”. Include a bottom-center Japanese caption strip and a small emblem logo at the bottom right. Use a neon color palette dominated by electric magenta, violet, black, and cyan, with glowing rim light, ink splatter accents, sharp graphic diagonals, halftone textures, glossy highlights, and layered UI-like editorial details. The overall feeling should be edgy, youthful, stylish, and cinematic, like a premium sci-fi visual culture magazine cover.
